name: arbcfo
description: Invoice → Approval → USDC payment → Audit-ready receipt on Arbitrum

scripts.contracts:deploy:sepolia: cd contracts && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url arbitrum-sepolia --broadcast --verify
scripts.contracts:deploy:arbone: cd contracts && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url arbitrum-one --broadcast --verify
scripts.stylus:check: cd contracts/stylus && cargo stylus check --endpoint https://sepolia-rollup.arbitrum.io/rpc
scripts.stylus:deploy: cd contracts/stylus && cargo stylus deploy --endpoint https://sepolia-rollup.arbitrum.io/rpc
